data.body: Escalated: fix requires edits to CLAUDE.md ('Always Do These' section — new rule: yes-as-authorization) and fix-bug/SKILL.md (post-creation validation, line 184). Both are safeguarded files. Needs explicit user authorization to add: 'When user responds yes/sure/go ahead to an implied action suggestion, treat as authorization and execute immediately — do NOT re-ask.' Diagnosis: Failure Mode 3 (confirmation-seeking overrides user's clear implicit intent).
